confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of cutting pattern and progression throughout task. Deviation measurements estimated from video resolution and angle - minor uncertainty in exact millimeter measurements.

technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with rapid completion time of 84 seconds and minimal deviations from marked cutting line. Smooth, controlled cutting technique maintained throughout.
strengths: Very fast completion time well within expert range (60-90s)
Consistent cutting technique with good instrument control
Successful pattern completion without gauze detachment
improvement_suggestions: Focus on maintaining exact line precision to minimize deviation penalties
Could potentially improve speed slightly while maintaining current precision
